---
title: "RTT Predation Study - Random Forest and PCA Analysis"
subtitle: "Variable Importance and Ordination of Predation Predictors"
author: "Allyson DeMerlis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# Setup

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(here)
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(readxl)
library(randomForest)
library(plotrix)
library(cowplot)
library(ggrepel)
library(ragg)
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
library(glmmTMB)
library(DHARMa)


i_am("Analysis_AllysonDeMerlis.Rproj")
opts_knit$set(root.dir = here())

theme_pnas <- function() {
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    text         = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title   = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text    = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.title   = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold"),
    strip.text   = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.line    = element_line(linewidth = 0.4),
    axis.ticks   = element_line(linewidth = 0.4)
  )
}
theme_set(theme_pnas())

species_colors <- c(
  "M. cavernosa" = "#CC5500",
  "O. faveolata" = "#5A8754",
  "P. clivosa"   = "#E1AD01"
)

```

---

# Load and Prepare Data

```{r load data, include=FALSE}
outplant_monitoring <- read_xlsx(
  "Supplementary Table 1 - Coral Outplant and Fish Data.xlsx",
  sheet = "tidyCoral RT_Outplant_Corrected"
)

# adding site characteristics (depth, strata)
outplant_monitoring %>% 
  dplyr::select(Region, Site, DEPTH, STRATA) %>% 
  distinct()  -> site_characteristics

fish_survey <- read_xlsx(
  "input_files/Supplementary Table 1 - Coral Outplant and Fish Data.xlsx",
  sheet = "tidy Fish RT_DETAIL"
)

DRM_coral <- read_xlsx("input_files/RT_DRM_Colonies_UM.xlsx")
DRM_all <- read_xlsx("input_files/RT_DRM_General_UM.xlsx", sheet = "RT_DRM_Survey_Edited")

DRM_all %>% 
  dplyr::select(`Region:`:`Date:`, Rugosity_1:Rugosity_10, `Depth:`, `Habitat:`, `Number of corals`) %>% 
  rename(Region = `Region:`,
         Site = `Site:`,
         Date = `Date:`,
         Depth_m = `Depth:`,
         Habitat = `Habitat:`,
         Num_corals = `Number of corals`) %>% 
  mutate(Transect = as.double(Transect))%>% 
  mutate(Region_name = case_when(Region == 1 ~ "Martin/Palm Beach",
                                 Region == 2 ~ "Broward-Miami",
                                 Region == 3 ~ "Biscayne",
                                 Region == 4 ~ "Upper Keys",
                                 Region == 5 ~ "Middle Keys",
                                 Region == 6 ~ "Lower Keys")) %>%
  mutate(Region_name = fct_relevel(Region_name, "Martin/Palm Beach", "Broward-Miami", "Biscayne", "Upper Keys", "Middle Keys", "Lower Keys")) -> DRM_general_tidy

DRM_coral %>% 
  dplyr::select(Region, Site, Transect, Species:Heightcm) -> DRM_coral_tidy

full_join(DRM_general_tidy, DRM_coral_tidy, by = c("Region", "Site", "Transect")) -> DRM_full_tidy

DRM_coral %>% 
  mutate(Region_name = case_when(Region == 1 ~ "Martin/Palm Beach",
                                 Region == 2 ~ "Broward-Miami",
                                 Region == 3 ~ "Biscayne",
                                 Region == 4 ~ "Upper Keys",
                                 Region == 5 ~ "Middle Keys",
                                 Region == 6 ~ "Lower Keys")) %>%
  mutate(Region_name = fct_relevel(Region_name, "Martin/Palm Beach", "Broward-Miami", "Biscayne", "Upper Keys", "Middle Keys", "Lower Keys")) -> DRM_coral

DRM_general_tidy %>% 
  left_join(., site_characteristics, by = c("Region", "Site")) -> DRM_general_tidy

DRM_coral %>% 
  left_join(., site_characteristics, by = c("Region", "Site")) -> DRM_coral

# ── Region name helper ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
recode_regions <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(Region_name = case_when(
      Region == 1 ~ "Martin/Palm Beach",
      Region == 2 ~ "Broward-Miami",
      Region == 3 ~ "Biscayne",
      Region == 4 ~ "Upper Keys",
      Region == 5 ~ "Middle Keys",
      Region == 6 ~ "Lower Keys"
    )) %>%
    mutate(Region_name = fct_relevel(
      Region_name,
      "Martin/Palm Beach", "Broward-Miami", "Biscayne",
      "Upper Keys", "Middle Keys", "Lower Keys"
    ))
}

outplant_monitoring <- recode_regions(outplant_monitoring)
fish_survey         <- recode_regions(fish_survey)

# ── Fish abundances ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Per monitoring interval (temporal variation)
fish_abundances_mi <- fish_survey %>%
  dplyr::select(Region, Site, MI_CORRECTED, Parrotfish, Butterflyfish) %>%
  rename(parrotfish_at_mi = Parrotfish, butterflyfish_at_mi = Butterflyfish)

# Site-level means (across all time)
fish_abundances_site <- fish_survey %>%
  group_by(Region, Site) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_parrotfish    = mean(Parrotfish,    na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_butterflyfish = mean(Butterflyfish, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ── Date handling ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
outplant_fish_dates <- fish_survey %>%
  dplyr::select(MI_CORRECTED, Region, Site, Date) %>%
  distinct()

outplant_with_dates <- left_join(
  outplant_monitoring, outplant_fish_dates,
  by = c("MI_CORRECTED", "Region", "Site")
)

middle_date_by_MI <- outplant_with_dates %>%
  dplyr::select(MI_CORRECTED, Date) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(Date) %>%
  group_by(MI_CORRECTED) %>%
  slice(ceiling(n() / 2)) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  rename(Middle_MI_date = Date)

outplant_days <- left_join(outplant_with_dates, middle_date_by_MI, by = "MI_CORRECTED") %>%
  mutate(
    Date_Monitored = coalesce(Date, Middle_MI_date),
    Exact_Days     = as.numeric(as.Date(Date_Monitored) - as.Date("2021-05-06")),
    Days_MI        = as.numeric(as.Date(Middle_MI_date) - as.Date("2021-05-06"))
  )

# ── Predation metrics ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
outplant_tidy <- outplant_days %>%
  arrange(Region, Site, ColonyNumber, MI_CORRECTED) %>%
  group_by(Region, Site, ColonyNumber) %>%
  mutate(
    Experienced_Predation = ifelse(
      (FishBites == "yes" | PRED_1 > 0) & Snails == "no", 1, 0
    ),
    Cumulative_Predation = ifelse(
      cumsum(ifelse(Experienced_Predation == 1, 1, 0)) > 0, 1, 0
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    Species = case_when(
      Species == "MCAV" ~ "M. cavernosa",
      Species == "OFAV" ~ "O. faveolata",
      Species == "PCLI" ~ "P. clivosa"
    ),
    STRATA_num   = ifelse(STRATA == "Offshore", 1, 0),
    Region       = as.numeric(as.character(Region)),
    Site         = as.numeric(as.character(Site))
  )

# ── DRM site metrics ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Rugosity: mean across all transects per site
drm_rugosity <- DRM_general_tidy %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = Rugosity_1:Rugosity_10, names_to = "Rugosity_Measurement", values_to = "Rugosity_Value") %>% 
  group_by(Region_name, Site) %>% 
  mutate(mean_rugosity = mean(Rugosity_Value), 
                              std_dev_rugosity = sd(Rugosity_Value),
         avg_depth = mean(Depth_m),
          rugosity_range = max(Rugosity_Value) - min(Rugosity_Value)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(Region_name, Site, STRATA, mean_rugosity, std_dev_rugosity, avg_depth, Habitat, rugosity_range) %>% 
  distinct()

# Coral density from DRM colony data
# 4, 1 x 10 m transects = 40m^2 reef area
#Mean ± SE density (number of colonies/m2)

coral_density_region_strata <-DRM_general_tidy %>% 
  group_by(Region, STRATA) %>% 
  summarize(total_corals = sum(Num_corals),
            mean_density_per_m2 = mean(Num_corals/80), #80 m2 because 2 sites combined for each strata
            se_density_per_m2 = sd(Num_corals/80)/sqrt(n()))

coral_density_site <- DRM_general_tidy %>% 
  group_by(Region_name, Site) %>% 
  summarize(total_corals = sum(Num_corals),
            mean_density_per_m2 = mean(Num_corals/40), # 40m2 because each site
            se_density_per_m2 = sd(Num_corals/40)/sqrt(n()))

# Coral cover from DRM colony data
# Coral cover as a percentage of the total area
# if the total area is 40 m ^2 per site
# take surface area of the coral - area of a circle using diameter, and then multiply by live tissue area % (add up old + recent mortality, then subtract that from area)
# area of circle formula = A = 0.25πd^2

coral_cover_site <- DRM_coral %>% 
  mutate(Area_cm2 = 0.25 * pi * (Widthcm^2),
         Live_tissue_percent = 100 - (OldMortality + OtherRecentMort + DiseaseRecentMort),
         Live_tissue_area_cm2 = Area_cm2 * (Live_tissue_percent / 100)) %>% 
  group_by(Region_name, Site) %>% 
  summarize(total_live_tissue_area_cm2 = sum(Live_tissue_area_cm2, na.rm = TRUE),
            total_live_tissue_area_m2 = total_live_tissue_area_cm2 / 10000,
            percent_cover = (total_live_tissue_area_m2 / 40) * 100) %>% 
  ungroup()

# ── Build site × MI summary (unit of analysis for RF and nMDS) ───────────────
# Each row = one coral species at one site at one monitoring interval
# Predation metrics averaged across colonies

site_mi_summary <- outplant_tidy %>%
  filter(!(MI_CORRECTED == 2 & Region == 3)) %>%  # remove incomplete MI
  group_by(Region_name, Region, Site, MI_CORRECTED, Days_MI, STRATA_num, Species) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pred_occurrence = mean(Experienced_Predation, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_ever_predated   = mean(Cumulative_Predation,  na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_intensity       = mean(PRED_1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_colonies           = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  # Join temporal fish abundances
  left_join(fish_abundances_mi %>%
              mutate(Region = as.numeric(Region), Site = as.numeric(Site)),
            by = c("Region", "Site", "MI_CORRECTED")) %>%
  # Join site-level fish means
  left_join(fish_abundances_site %>%
              mutate(Region = as.numeric(Region), Site = as.numeric(Site)),
            by = c("Region", "Site")) %>%
  # Join DRM metrics
   left_join(drm_rugosity %>%
              dplyr::select(Region_name, Site,
                            mean_rugosity, avg_depth, Habitat),
            by = c("Region_name", "Site")) %>%
  left_join(coral_density_site %>%
              dplyr::select(Region_name, Site, mean_density_per_m2),
            by = c("Region_name", "Site")) %>%
  left_join(coral_cover_site %>%
              dplyr::select(Region_name, Site, percent_cover),
            by = c("Region_name", "Site"))

site_mi_summary %>% 
  left_join(., site_characteristics, by = c("Region", "Site")) -> site_mi_summary
```

# Coral density and cover plots
```{r}
strata_plot1<-DRM_general_tidy %>% 
  group_by(Region_name, STRATA) %>% # 2 sites per strata, 40 m^2 per site
  summarize(total_corals = sum(Num_corals),
            mean_density_per_m2 = mean(Num_corals/80),
            se_density_per_m2 = sd(Num_corals/80)/sqrt(n())) %>% 
  ggplot(., aes(x=STRATA, y=mean_density_per_m2, color = Region_name)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_density_per_m2 - se_density_per_m2, ymax=mean_density_per_m2 + se_density_per_m2), width=0.2) +
  theme_pnas() +
  labs(y = expression(Coral~density~(colonies / m^2)),
       x = "Region") +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  theme(plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 20, l = 30, unit = "pt")) +
  facet_wrap(~Region_name, scales = "free")

strata_plot_2<-DRM_coral %>% 
  mutate(Area_cm2 = 0.25 * pi * (Widthcm^2),
         Live_tissue_percent = 100 - (OldMortality + OtherRecentMort + DiseaseRecentMort),
         Live_tissue_area_cm2 = Area_cm2 * (Live_tissue_percent / 100)) %>% 
  group_by(Region_name, Site, STRATA) %>% 
  summarize(total_live_tissue_area_cm2 = sum(Live_tissue_area_cm2, na.rm = TRUE),
            total_live_tissue_area_m2 = total_live_tissue_area_cm2 / 10000,
            percent_cover = (total_live_tissue_area_m2 / 40) * 100) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  group_by(Region_name, STRATA) %>% 
  summarise(mean_percent_cover = mean(percent_cover),
            se_percent_cover = sd(percent_cover)/sqrt(n())) %>%
  ggplot(., aes(x=STRATA, y=mean_percent_cover, color = Region_name)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_percent_cover - se_percent_cover, ymax=mean_percent_cover + se_percent_cover), width=0.2) +
    theme_pnas() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(y="Coral cover (%)",
       x = "Region") +
  theme(plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 10, l = 30, unit = "pt")) +
  facet_wrap(~Region_name, scales = "free")

cowplot::plot_grid(strata_plot1, strata_plot_2, ncol = 1, labels = c("A", "B"))
ggsave("plots/Manuscript Figures/FigS5_coral_density_cover.pdf",
       width  = 20, height = 17, units = "cm",
       dpi    = 600)
```
### stats

```{r}
export_glmm <- function(model, name, emmeans_specs) {
  as.data.frame(car::Anova(model, type = "II")) %>%
    rownames_to_column("Term") %>%
    write_csv(paste0("SI_tables/", name, "_anova.csv"))
  
  broom.mixed::tidy(model, effects = "fixed") %>%
    write_csv(paste0("SI_tables/", name, "_fixed_effects.csv"))
  
  # emmeans_specs is a named list, e.g. list(strata_within_region = "pairwise ~ STRATA | Region_name", region_within_strata = "pairwise ~ Region_name | STRATA")
  for (spec_name in names(emmeans_specs)) {
    em <- emmeans::emmeans(model, as.formula(emmeans_specs[[spec_name]]), adjust = "tukey")
    as.data.frame(em$contrasts) %>%
      write_csv(paste0("SI_tables/", name, "_emmeans_", spec_name, ".csv"))
  }
  cat("Exported:", name, "\n")
}
```

coral density
```{r}
# calculate individual coral density for each transect (number of corals per 10 meter transect)
DRM_general_tidy %>% 
  dplyr::select(Region, Site, Transect, Num_corals:STRATA) %>% 
  mutate(density_per_m2 = Num_corals/10) -> DRM_density_stats

density_glm <- glmmTMB(density_per_m2 ~ Region_name * STRATA + (1|Region/Site/Transect), data = DRM_density_stats, family = gaussian)

summary(density_glm)

sim_res_density_glm <- simulateResiduals(density_glm)
plot(sim_res_density_glm)

car::Anova(density_glm, Type = "II")
# region, strata, and interaction are significant

emmeans::emmeans(density_glm, pairwise ~ STRATA | Region_name)
# only monroe county sites are significantly different between inshore and offshore within each region

emmeans::emmeans(density_glm, pairwise ~ Region_name|STRATA)
# inshore, Martin/Palm beach significantly lower Martin/Palm beach than all other counties (except Broward and Miami Dade)

emm_strata <- emmeans::emmeans(density_glm, pairwise ~ STRATA | Region_name,
                                adjust = "tukey")
print(emm_strata$contrasts)
```

coral cover
```{r}
# calculate proportion of total transect area covered by coral 
DRM_coral %>% 
  mutate(Area_cm2 = 0.25 * pi * (Widthcm^2),
         Live_tissue_percent = 100 - (OldMortality + OtherRecentMort + DiseaseRecentMort),
         Live_tissue_area_cm2 = Area_cm2 * (Live_tissue_percent / 100)) %>% 
  group_by(Region, Site, Transect) %>% 
  summarize(total_live_tissue_area_cm2 = sum(Live_tissue_area_cm2, na.rm = TRUE),
            total_live_tissue_area_m2 = total_live_tissue_area_cm2 / 10000,
            percent_cover = (total_live_tissue_area_m2 / 10),
            STRATA = first(STRATA),
            Region_name = first(Region_name)) -> DRM_cover_stats

coral_cover_glm <- glmmTMB(percent_cover ~ Region_name * STRATA + (1|Region/Site/Transect),
                 data = DRM_cover_stats,
                 family = beta_family())

summary(coral_cover_glm)
sim_res_coral_cover_glm <- simulateResiduals(coral_cover_glm)
plot(sim_res_coral_cover_glm)

car::Anova(coral_cover_glm, Type = "II")

emmeans::emmeans(coral_cover_glm, pairwise ~ STRATA | Region_name)
# only monroe county sites are significantly different between inshore and offshore within each region

emmeans::emmeans(coral_cover_glm, pairwise ~ Region_name|STRATA)

export_glmm(density_glm, "density",
            list(strata_within_region = "pairwise ~ STRATA | Region_name",
                 region_within_strata = "pairwise ~ Region_name | STRATA"))

export_glmm(coral_cover_glm, "coral_cover",
            list(strata_within_region = "pairwise ~ STRATA | Region_name",
                 region_within_strata = "pairwise ~ Region_name | STRATA"))
```

```{r}
vars <- c("mean_rugosity", "percent_cover", "mean_density_per_m2")
fish <- c("mean_parrotfish", "mean_butterflyfish")

site_data <- site_mi_summary %>%
  filter(MI_CORRECTED == 25) %>%
  group_by(Region, Region_name, Site, STRATA, STRATA_num,
           mean_parrotfish, mean_butterflyfish,
           avg_depth, mean_rugosity,
           mean_density_per_m2, percent_cover) %>%
  summarise(
    prop_ever_predated = mean(prop_ever_predated, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_intensity     = mean(mean_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cor_results <- expand_grid(site_var = vars, fish_var = fish) %>%
  mutate(
    test = map2(site_var, fish_var, ~ cor.test(site_data[[.x]], site_data[[.y]], method = "spearman")),
    rho  = map_dbl(test, ~ .x$estimate),
    p    = map_dbl(test, ~ .x$p.value)
  ) %>%
  select(site_var, fish_var, rho, p)

print(cor_results)

write_csv(cor_results, "SI_tables/rugosity_cover_density_fish_correlations.csv")
```

```{r}
site_vars <- c("mean_rugosity", "percent_cover", "mean_density_per_m2")
fish_vars <- c("mean_parrotfish", "mean_butterflyfish")

var_labels <- c(
  mean_rugosity = "Mean rugosity",
  percent_cover = "Mean coral cover (%)",
  mean_density_per_m2 = "Mean coral density (colonies/m²)",
  mean_parrotfish = "Mean parrotfish abundance",
  mean_butterflyfish = "Mean butterflyfish abundance"
)

plot_data <- expand_grid(site_var = site_vars, fish_var = fish_vars) %>%
  mutate(
    test = map2(site_var, fish_var, ~ cor.test(site_data[[.x]], site_data[[.y]],
                                                 method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)),
    rho  = map_dbl(test, ~ .x$estimate),
    p    = map_dbl(test, ~ .x$p.value),
    label = sprintf("Spearman R = %.2f, p = %s", rho,
                     ifelse(p < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p)))
  )

make_panel <- function(site_var, fish_var, label, show_legend = FALSE) {
  d <- site_data
  x_range <- range(d[[site_var]], na.rm = TRUE)
  y_range <- range(d[[fish_var]], na.rm = TRUE)

  p <- ggplot(d, aes(x = .data[[site_var]], y = .data[[fish_var]])) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Region_name), size = 2.5, alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed",
                color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.5) +
    annotate("text",
             x = x_range[2], y = y_range[1],
             hjust = 1, vjust = 0,
             label = label, size = 2.8, fontface = "italic") +
    labs(x = var_labels[[site_var]], y = var_labels[[fish_var]], color = "Region") +
    theme_pnas() +
    theme(legend.position = if (show_legend) "right" else "none")
  p
}

panels <- plot_data %>%
  mutate(plot = pmap(list(site_var, fish_var, label), make_panel))

legend_plot <- make_panel(plot_data$site_var[1], plot_data$fish_var[1],
                           plot_data$label[1], show_legend = TRUE) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        legend.box = "horizontal")
legend <- get_legend(legend_plot)

grid <- plot_grid(plotlist = panels$plot, ncol = 2, nrow = 3,
                   labels = "AUTO", label_size = 10)

# stack grid on top, legend below, horizontal row
final_fig <- plot_grid(grid, legend, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 0.08))

ggsave("plots/Manuscript Figures/FigS6_rugosity_cover_density_fish_corr.pdf",
       plot = final_fig, width = 17.4, height = 22, units = "cm",
       dpi = 600)
```




# Random Forest: Variable Importance for Cumulative Predation Prevalence
```{r}
# Primary RF — cumulative predation prevalence
rf_data <- site_mi_summary %>%
  dplyr::select(
    prop_ever_predated,    # response — cumulative prevalence at site x MI
    Region, STRATA, MI_CORRECTED,
    mean_parrotfish, mean_butterflyfish,
    avg_depth, mean_rugosity,
    mean_density_per_m2, percent_cover
  ) %>%
  mutate(Region = as.factor(Region),
         STRATA = as.factor(STRATA)) %>% 
  na.omit() # lose 12 rows from when parrotfish and butterflyfish surveys were skipped- ok

# Train/test split
set.seed(123)
train_idx <- sample(nrow(rf_data), nrow(rf_data) * 0.75)

rf_train <- rf_data[train_idx, ]
rf_test  <- rf_data[-train_idx, ]

cat("Total observations (rf_data):", nrow(rf_data), "\n")
cat("Training set:", nrow(rf_train), "\n")
cat("Test set:", nrow(rf_test), "\n")
```

```{r rf regression cumulative predation prevalence}
rf_cumulative <- randomForest(
  prop_ever_predated ~ .,
  data       = rf_train,
  ntree      = 1000,
  importance = TRUE,
  mtry       = floor(sqrt(ncol(rf_train) - 1))
)

print(rf_cumulative)

# Out-of-bag error
cat("OOB R-squared:", round(1 - rf_cumulative$mse[1000] / var(rf_train$prop_ever_predated), 3), "\n")

# Test set performance
pred_test <- predict(rf_cumulative, newdata = rf_test)
ss_res  <- sum((rf_test$prop_ever_predated - pred_test)^2)
ss_tot  <- sum((rf_test$prop_ever_predated - mean(rf_test$prop_ever_predated))^2)
cat("Test R-squared:", round(1 - ss_res / ss_tot, 3), "\n")
```


```{r}
importance_df <- as.data.frame(importance(rf_cumulative)) %>%
  rownames_to_column("Variable") %>%
  arrange(`%IncMSE`) %>%
  mutate(Variable = factor(Variable, levels = Variable))

print(importance_df)
```


```{r}
importance_df <- importance_df %>%
  mutate(
    Variable_label = case_match(
      as.character(Variable),
      "Region"               ~ "Region",
      "STRATA"               ~ "Strata",
      "MI_CORRECTED"         ~ "Monitoring interval",
      "mean_parrotfish"      ~ "Mean parrotfish (site)",
      "mean_butterflyfish"   ~ "Mean butterflyfish (site)",
      "avg_depth"            ~ "Depth (site)",
      "mean_rugosity"        ~ "Rugosity (site)",
      "mean_density_per_m2"  ~ "Coral density (colonies/m²) (site)",
      "percent_cover"        ~ "Coral cover (%) (site)",
      .default = as.character(Variable)
    ),
    Variable_label = factor(Variable_label, levels = Variable_label)
  )

p_rf <- ggplot(importance_df, aes(x = `%IncMSE`, y = Variable_label)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#4a90d9") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey40") +
  labs(x = "% Increase in MSE", y = NULL) +
  theme_pnas()

ggsave("plots/Manuscript Figures/FigRF_variable_importance.tiff",
       plot   = p_rf,
       width  = 8.7, height = 8, units = "cm",
       dpi    = 600, compression = "lzw",
       device = ragg::agg_tiff)
```


## comparing mean fish abundane vs fish abundance at every mi
```{r}
# Version 1: temporal fish
rf_data_v1 <- site_mi_summary %>%
  dplyr::select(
    prop_ever_predated,
    Region, STRATA, MI_CORRECTED,
    parrotfish_at_mi, butterflyfish_at_mi,
    avg_depth, mean_rugosity,
    mean_density_per_m2, percent_cover
  ) %>%
  mutate(Region = as.factor(Region),
         STRATA = as.factor(STRATA)) %>%
  na.omit()

# Version 2: site-level fish means
rf_data_v2 <- site_mi_summary %>%
  dplyr::select(
    prop_ever_predated,
    Region, STRATA, MI_CORRECTED,
    mean_parrotfish, mean_butterflyfish,
    avg_depth, mean_rugosity,
    mean_density_per_m2, percent_cover
  ) %>%
  mutate(Region = as.factor(Region),
         STRATA = as.factor(STRATA)) %>%
  na.omit()

set.seed(123)
rf_v1 <- randomForest(prop_ever_predated ~ ., data = rf_data_v1,
                      ntree = 1000, importance = TRUE)
rf_v2 <- randomForest(prop_ever_predated ~ ., data = rf_data_v2,
                      ntree = 1000, importance = TRUE)

cat("V1 (temporal fish) % Var explained:", rf_v1$rsq[1000] * 100, "\n")
cat("V2 (site mean fish) % Var explained:", rf_v2$rsq[1000] * 100, "\n")

print(importance(rf_v1))
print(importance(rf_v2))

# site mean is better -- 87% of variance explained, mean fish abundances rank higher
```


# Random Forest: Variable Importance for Predation Intensity

```{r rf data prep}
rf_intensity <- site_mi_summary %>%
  dplyr::select(
    mean_intensity,       # response
    Region, STRATA, MI_CORRECTED,
    parrotfish_at_mi, butterflyfish_at_mi,
    mean_parrotfish, mean_butterflyfish,
    avg_depth, mean_rugosity,
    mean_density_per_m2, percent_cover,
    n_colonies
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Region     = as.factor(Region),
    STRATA = as.factor(STRATA)
  ) %>%
  na.omit()

# Train/test split
set.seed(123)
train_idx <- sample(nrow(rf_intensity), nrow(rf_intensity) * 0.75)

rf_train <- rf_intensity[train_idx, ]
rf_test  <- rf_intensity[-train_idx, ]
```

```{r rf regression predation intensity}

rf_intensity <- randomForest(
  mean_intensity ~ .,
  data       = rf_train,
  ntree      = 1000,
  importance = TRUE,
  mtry       = floor(sqrt(ncol(rf_train) - 1))
)

print(rf_intensity)

# Out-of-bag error
cat("OOB R-squared:", round(1 - rf_intensity$mse[1000] / var(rf_train$mean_intensity), 3), "\n")

# Test set performance
pred_test <- predict(rf_intensity, newdata = rf_test)
ss_res  <- sum((rf_test$mean_intensity - pred_test)^2)
ss_tot  <- sum((rf_test$mean_intensity - mean(rf_test$mean_intensity))^2)
cat("Test R-squared:", round(1 - ss_res / ss_tot, 3), "\n")
```

```{r rf variable importance plot}
# Extract importance
importance_df <- as.data.frame(importance(rf_intensity)) %>%
  rownames_to_column("Variable") %>%
  arrange(`%IncMSE`) %>%
  mutate(Variable = factor(Variable, levels = Variable))

p_rf_intensity <- ggplot(importance_df,
                          aes(x = `%IncMSE`, y = Variable)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#4a90d9") +
  labs(x = "% Increase in MSE", y = NULL,
       title = "Predation intensity") +
  theme_pnas()

print(p_rf_intensity)
```


---

# PCA
```{r}
# Site-level predictor matrix — one row per site
pca_meta <- site_mi_summary %>%
  filter(MI_CORRECTED == 25) %>%
  group_by(Region, Region_name, Site, STRATA, STRATA_num,
           mean_parrotfish, mean_butterflyfish,
           avg_depth, mean_rugosity,
           mean_density_per_m2, percent_cover) %>%
  summarise(
    prop_ever_predated = mean(prop_ever_predated, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_intensity     = mean(mean_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pca_data <- pca_meta %>%
  dplyr::select(
    mean_parrotfish, mean_butterflyfish,
    avg_depth, mean_rugosity,
    mean_density_per_m2, percent_cover
  ) %>%
  scale() %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Run PCA
pca_result <- prcomp(pca_data, center = FALSE, scale. = FALSE)  # already scaled
summary(pca_result)
summary(pca_result)$importance[2, 1:4] * 100

# Verify row count matches PCA
nrow(pca_meta) == nrow(pca_result$x)

# Extract scores and join metadata
pca_scores <- as.data.frame(pca_result$x[, 1:2]) %>%
  bind_cols(pca_meta %>%
              dplyr::select(Region_name, STRATA, Site,
                            prop_ever_predated, mean_intensity))

# How much variance do PC1 and PC2 explain?
pca_var <- summary(pca_result)$importance[2, 1:2] * 100
cat("PC1:", round(pca_var[1], 1), "% PC2:", round(pca_var[2], 1), "%\n")

# Raw loadings, all PCs
pca_result$rotation

# Just PC1 and PC2, sorted by absolute contribution to PC1
loadings_df <- as.data.frame(pca_result$rotation[, 1:2]) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("variable") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    abs_PC1 = abs(PC1),
    abs_PC2 = abs(PC2)
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs_PC1))

print(loadings_df)

contrib <- as.data.frame(pca_result$rotation^2) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("variable") |>
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(-variable, ~ .x / sum(.x) * 100))

print(contrib)

# Add loading vectors to show which variables drive each axis
pca_loadings <- as.data.frame(pca_result$rotation[, 1:2]) %>%
  rownames_to_column("Variable") %>%
  mutate(Variable = case_match(
    Variable,
    "mean_parrotfish"      ~ "Parrotfish",
    "mean_butterflyfish"   ~ "Butterflyfish",
    "avg_depth"            ~ "Depth",
    "mean_rugosity"        ~ "Rugosity",
    "mean_density_per_m2"  ~ "Coral density",
    "percent_cover"        ~ "Coral cover"
  ))

arrow_scale <- 3 

p_pca <- ggplot(pca_scores, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Region_name, size = prop_ever_predated), alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_segment(data = pca_loadings,
               aes(x = 0, y = 0,
                   xend = PC1 * arrow_scale,
                   yend = PC2 * arrow_scale),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               color = "grey30", linewidth = 0.5,
               inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text_repel(data = pca_loadings,
                  aes(x = PC1 * arrow_scale * 1.2,
                      y = PC2 * arrow_scale * 1.2,
                      label = Variable),
                  size = 3, color = "grey30",
                  inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(1, 5),
                        labels = scales::percent_format(),
                        name = "Cumulative\npredation\nprevalence") +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", round(pca_var[1], 1), "% variance)"),
       y = paste0("PC2 (", round(pca_var[2], 1), "% variance)"),
       color = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3)),
         fill = "none") +
  theme_pnas()

print(p_pca)

ggsave("plots/Manuscript Figures/FigPCA_site_characteristics.tiff",
       plot   = p_pca,
       width  = 8.7, height = 8, units = "cm",
       dpi    = 600, compression = "lzw",
       device = ragg::agg_tiff)

```

export PCA
```{r}
as.data.frame(pca_result$rotation[, 1:6]) %>%
  rownames_to_column("Variable") %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 3))) %>%
  write_csv("SI_tables/PCA_loadings.csv")

as.data.frame(summary(pca_result)$importance) %>%
  rownames_to_column("Metric") %>%
  write_csv("SI_tables/PCA_variance_explained.csv")
```



combined plots
```{r}
plot_grid(p_rf, p_pca, ncol = 2, labels = c("A", "B"), rel_widths = c(1, 1.5))
ggsave("plots/Manuscript Figures/Fig5.pdf",
       width  = 8, height = 4,
       dpi    = 600)
```
